Pengil.name: 彭吉尔 Pengil
Pengil.description:
彭吉尔、阿普特诺与斯芬尼西克

元素 冰

属性调整值 Str -1, Dex +3, Con +2, Int +1, Wis +4, Cha +0

Eldamon语言 Cryan

Eldamon生命值 6

Eldamon技能 特技、运动、生存

Eldamon豁免 反射

感官 弱光视野

抗力 寒冷、植物、音波、时代、木质

弱点 身体、大地、火、金属

速度 25尺

近战 1 爪击（灵巧、敏捷；仅在进化时触及10尺）；伤害 1d4 寒冷（仅在进化时为1d6 寒冷）

进化状态 帮助彭吉尔享受一次史诗般的雪橇体验。

元素能力 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.Vvsz2IjoAKW7DdFt]{Icewalker}你无视由冰与积雪造成的困难地形与强效困难地形，并且在穿越冰面时不会冒坠落的风险。你将冻结状态对你速度造成的减值减少10尺。

形态能力 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.STUnpqmdpv20oNDs]{Slide}当你用肚皮滑行时，你可以沿直线移动得更快。每当你疾走时，你可以选择用肚皮滑行。若如此做，你必须沿直线移动，但你的速度获得+15尺环境加值。

进化能力 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.VD2oRo0b2iBZyDI8]{Cloak of Snow}沿着你背部的一条雪之斗篷在你滑行时保护你，并强化你滑行的能力。你在使用你的滑行能力时，你的速度获得+25尺环境加值，而非+15尺环境加值。你在移动时会被雪之斗篷所隐蔽，并且当你使用滑行能力移动时，你的AC获得+2环境加值。

Evolution Condition Helping pengil enjoy an epic sledding experience.

Elemental Ability @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.Vvsz2IjoAKW7DdFt]{Icewalker}You ignore difficult terrain and greater difficult terrain from ice and snow and don’t risk falling when crossing ice. You reduce the penalty to your Speeds from the frozen condition by 10 feet.

Form Ability @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.STUnpqmdpv20oNDs]{Slide}When you slide on your belly, you can move faster in a straight line. Whenever you Stride, you can choose to slide on your belly. If you do, you must move in a straight line, but you gain a +15-foot circumstance bonus to your Speed.

Evolution Ability @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.VD2oRo0b2iBZyDI8]{Cloak of Snow}A cloak of snow along your back protects you while sliding and enhances your ability to slide. You gain a +25-foot circumstance bonus to your Speed when you use your slide ability, instead of a +15-foot circumstance bonus. You are concealed by the cloak of snow while moving, and you gain a +2 circumstance bonus to AC while moving using your slide ability.

Ursili.name: 乌尔西利 Ursili
Ursili.description:
乌尔西利、乌尔萨尔瓦与卡利斯托斯

元素 活

属性调整值 Str +2, Dex +1, Con +3, Int -1, Wis +4, Cha +0

艾达蒙语言 Jyoti

艾达蒙生命值 8

艾达蒙技能 Athletics, Intimidation, Survival

艾达蒙豁免 Fortitude

感官 弱光视野

抗力 光，活力（由于它不是不死生物，通常不会被活力伤害）

弱点 黑暗，死亡，阴影

速度 25尺

近战 1 爪击（agile, finesse；仅在进化时触及10尺）；伤害 1d4 挥砍外加 1 点额外活力（仅在进化时为 1d6 挥砍外加 1 点额外活力）

进化条件 帮助乌尔西利体验一次真正不可思议的休息。

元素能力 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.joAJoiq53qGVIyRU]{Resurgent Awakening}你以及你治疗的对象，会带着重新投入战斗所需的能量从昏迷中醒来，宛如熊从冬眠中苏醒。每当你从 0 生命值被治疗并从昏迷或濒死（状态）中醒来时，在你的下一个回合，你获得加速，但只能用该动作来起立，或交互以拾起你在陷入昏迷时掉落的某个东西。每当你用活系力量将一个生物从 0 生命值治疗并使其从昏迷或濒死（状态）中醒来时，它也获得相同的好处。

形态能力 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.M0RX2fJqcLXVzvlo]{Vital Rest}当你休息片刻时，你会涌动着活力能量。在一次遭遇中，如果你整整一轮都未行动（通常是由于状态，如 stunned 或 paralyzed，或因为你延缓了整整一轮直到你的原本先攻再次到来），你获得等于 2 + 你的等级 的临时生命值，持续 2 轮。

进化能力 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.PzA1MgyWhd8o6dya]{Resurgent Life}你可以以单动作向四周散播生命，并具有专注（特征）。这会使植物等活的生物生长并向你移动，为你提供标准掩蔽，直到你下一个回合开始。

力量进程

属性调整值进程

进阶训练（5级） Str +3, Dex +2, Con +3, Int +0, Wis +4, Cha +1

艾达蒙进化（11级） Str +4, Dex +2, Con +4, Int +0, Wis +5, Cha +1

顶峰训练（15级） Str +4, Dex +3, Con +5, Int +1, Wis +5, Cha +2

最终属性提升（17级） Str +4, Dex +3, Con +5, Int +1, Wis +6, Cha +2

Ursili, Ursalva, and Kallistos

Element Life

Attribute Modifiers Str +2, Dex +1, Con +3, Int -1, Wis +4, Cha +0

Eldamon Language Jyoti

Eldamon Hit Points 8

Eldamon Skills Athletics, Intimidation, Survival

Eldamon Saving Throw Fortitude

Senses low-light vision

Resistance light, vitality (since it isn’t undead, it can’t normally be harmed by vitality)

Weaknesses darkness, death, shadow

Speed 25 feet

Melee 1 claw (agile, finesse; reach 10 feet when evolved only); Damage 1d4 slashing plus 1 additional vitality (1d6 slashing plus 1 additional vitality when evolved only)

Evolution Condition Helping ursili experience a truly incredible rest.

Elemental Ability @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.joAJoiq53qGVIyRU]{Resurgent Awakening}You and those you heal awake from unconsciousness with the energy you need to re-enter the fight, like a bear coming out of hibernation. Whenever you are healed from 0 Hit Points and wake up from the unconscious or dying condition, on your next turn, you are quickened but can only use the action to Stand or to Interact to pick up something you dropped when you fell unconscious. Whenever you heal a creature from 0 Hit Points with a life power and they wake up from the unconscious or dying condition, they gain the same benefit.

Form Ability @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.M0RX2fJqcLXVzvlo]{Vital Rest}When you take a break, you surge with vital energy. During an encounter, if you don’t act for a full round (usually because of a condition such as stunned or paralyzed, or because you Delayed for an entire round until your original initiative came again), you gain temporary Hit Points equal to 2 plus your level, which last for 2 rounds.

Evolution Ability @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.PzA1MgyWhd8o6dya]{Resurgent Life}You can spread life all around, as a single action, which has the concentrate trait. This causes living creatures such as plants to grow and move toward you, providing you standard cover until the beginning of your next turn.

Morpup.name: 莫普普 Morpup
Morpup.description:
Morpup、Morhound 与 Morgarm

元素 死亡

属性调整值 Str +0, Dex +3, Con +2, Int -1, Wis +4, Cha +1

Eldamon 语言 Requian

Eldamon 生命值 6

Eldamon 技能 Acrobatics, Athletics, Intimidation

Eldamon 豁免 Reflex

感官 弱光视野

抗力 毒素, void

弱点 光, 灵体

速度 25 feet

近战 1 颌骨（agile, finesse；仅在进化时触及 10 feet）；伤害 1d4 穿刺（仅在进化时为 1d6 穿刺）

进化状态 帮助 morpup 从危险处境、长途旅程或类似情况中安全归来。

元素能力 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.5mmSPqcPg7otUoiI]{Rebirth}当你将要被降至 0 生命值时，你会重生并再次站起。你不会被降至 0 生命值，而是保持在 1 生命值，并获得等同于你等级的临时生命值。一旦你从重生中受益过，你在接下来的 1d4 小时内无法再次从中受益。

形态能力 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.so5jxRhs5ABtvFBi]{Scarf Glide}你的围巾使你能够在空气中滑翔。以一个具有移动（特征）的单动作，你朝地面移动 5 feet，并在空中最多移动 25 feet。与飞行的 eldamon 一样，如果你没有通过融合同步相位与自己的 eldamon 训练师合体，你会在你的回合结束时落到地面上，尽管你可以 Arrest the Fall。

进化能力 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.hh0ibZoLPRoNn3kv]{Red String of Fate}你可以使用围巾上散开的丝线，在相当远的距离勾住敌人，将他们的命运与你相连。你可以在最远 20 feet 的距离擒抱敌人。被你围巾抓住的敌人，对抗你的死亡力量时，其 Fortitude 豁免承受 -1 环境减值。

属性调整值进程

进阶训练（5th） Str +1, Dex +3, Con +3, Int +0, Wis +4, Cha +2

Eldamon 进化（11th） Str +1, Dex +4, Con +4, Int +0, Wis +5, Cha +2

最终属性提升（17th） Str +2, Dex +5, Con +4, Int +1, Wis +6, Cha +3

Morpup, Morhound, and Morgarm

Element Death

Attribute Modifiers Str +0, Dex +3, Con +2, Int -1, Wis +4, Cha +1

Eldamon Language Requian

Eldamon Hit Points 6

Eldamon Skills Acrobatics, Athletics, Intimidation

Eldamon Saving Throw Reflex

Senses low-light vision

Resistance poison, void

Weaknesses light, spirit

Speed 25 feet

Melee 1 jaws (agile, finesse; reach 10 feet when evolved only); Damage 1d4 piercing (1d6 piercing when evolved only)

Evolution Condition Helping morpup return safely from a dangerous situation, long journey, or the like.

Elemental Ability @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.5mmSPqcPg7otUoiI]{Rebirth}When you would be reduced to 0 Hit Points, you are reborn and rise again. Instead of being reduced to 0 Hit Points, you remain at 1 Hit Point and gain temporary Hit Points equal to your level. Once you’ve benefited from rebirth, you can’t benefit from it again for 1d4 hours.

Form Ability @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.so5jxRhs5ABtvFBi]{Scarf Glide}Your scarf allows you to glide through the air. As a single action, which has the move trait, you move 5 feet toward the ground and up to 25 feet through the air. Like flying eldamon, you land on the ground at the end of your turn if you aren’t combined with your eldamon trainer through Melded Phase, though you can Arrest the Fall.

Evolution Ability @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.hh0ibZoLPRoNn3kv]{Red String of Fate}You can use the unraveled strings of your scarf to latch onto foes at quite a distance, tying their fate to you. You can Grapple foes at a distance of up to 20 feet. Foes grabbed by your scarf take a -1 circumstance penalty to Fortitude saves against your death powers.

Grima.name: 格里玛 Grima
Grima.description:
格里玛、格里猫金与格里玛拉金

元素 死亡

属性调整值 Str +0, Dex +3, Con +2, Int -1, Wis +4, Cha +1

艾达蒙语言 Requian

艾达蒙生命值 6

艾达蒙技能 Acrobatics, Athletics, Stealth

艾达蒙豁免 Reflex

感官 弱光视野

抗力 poison, void

弱点 light, spirit

速度 25 feet

近战 1 尾巴（agile, finesse；仅在进化时触及 10 feet）；伤害 1d4 void（仅在进化时为 1d6 void）

进化状态 协助格里玛收集足够多来自具备足够力量等级或心理重要性的生物的临终吐息。

元素能力 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.Bm70JF7c2P1A6vCN]{Breathtaker}当你的死亡之力杀死一名敌人时，你会被其临终吐息所激励。直到你下个回合结束，你在察觉检定、豁免以及技能检定上获得 +1 状态加值。若你在享受此加值期间对该敌人使用 Reap Lives，或你用 Reap Lives 杀死一个生物，则该状态加值提高至 +2。

形态能力 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.s6Mq8Eav6Rf7jvfi]{Drink Breath}当你在附近时，你会饮下垂死敌人的最后一口气。若一名敌人在你 5 feet 内死亡，或你移动至一名在上一轮内死亡的敌人 5 feet 内，你可以以 自由动作（）窃取其最后一口气。若你如此做，你获得等同于你等级的临时生命值，持续 1 轮。

进化能力 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.sWz0B2GbMemNY6NH]{Thousand Breaths}你从无数最终吐息中吸收的生命精粹自你体内涌现，伤害攻击你的敌人。一名以近战徒手打击或非触及的近战打击命中你的生物，会受到等同于你等级一半（最低 1）的 void 伤害，并以你的力量 DC 进行一次基础 Fortitude 豁免。

Eldamon Hit Points 6

Eldamon Skills Acrobatics, Athletics, Stealth

Eldamon Saving Throw Reflex

Senses low-light vision

Resistance poison, void

Weaknesses light, spirit

Speed 25 feet

Melee 1 tail (agile, finesse; reach 10 feet when evolved only); Damage 1d4 void (1d6 void when evolved only)

Evolution Condition Helping grima collect enough last breaths of creatures with sufficient levels of power or psychological importance.

Elemental Ability @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.Bm70JF7c2P1A6vCN]{Breathtaker}When your death power kills a foe, you’re energized by their dying breath. You gain a +1 status bonus on Perception checks, saving throws, and skill checks until the end of your next turn. If you use Reap Lives on that foe while benefiting for this bonus, or if you kill a creature with Reap Lives, the status bonus increases to +2.

Form Ability @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.s6Mq8Eav6Rf7jvfi]{Drink Breath}You drink the last breath of a dying foe when you’re nearby. If a foe dies within 5 feet of you, or if you move within 5 feet of a foe who died in the last round, you can steal their last breath as a free action. If you do, you gain temporary Hit Points equal to your level, which last for 1 round.

Evolution Ability @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.sWz0B2GbMemNY6NH]{Thousand Breaths}The countless life essences you’ve absorbed from final breaths emerge from your body, harming foes who attack you. A creature that hits you with a melee unarmed Strike or a non-reach melee Strike takes void damage equal to half your level (minimum 1), with a basic Fortitude save against your power DC.

Porcute.name: 豪猪兽 Porcute
Porcute.description:
Porcute、Elecupine 与 Erethizap

元素 电击

属性调整值 Str +2, Dex +1, Con +3, Int -1, Wis +4, Cha +0

Eldamon 语言 Voltan

Eldamon 生命值 6

Eldamon 技能 Athletics, Intimidation, Survival

Eldamon 豁免 意志

感官 弱光视野

抗力 空气, 电击, 金属

弱点 大地, 精神, 传送

速度 25 英尺

近战 1 刺针（灵巧，娴熟；仅在进化时触及为 10 英尺）；伤害 1d6 电击（仅在进化时为 1d8 电击）

进化状态 帮助 porcute 信守承诺，并在严酷逆境中坚守其信条。

元素能力 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.L66kbQGfCYhMLjuh]{Jolt Spines}当一名敌人进行攻击出现大失败时，他们会打中一根沿你身体弧闪的电针，使其受到震慑。每当一名敌人以近战徒手攻击对你进行攻击掷骰并大失败，或一名相邻敌人进行任意近战攻击掷骰对你大失败时，他们受到 2 点电击伤害。若你在力量 DC 上为专家，该伤害提升至 4；若为大师，提升至 6；若为传奇，提升至 8。随后他们陷入震慑 1 轮。

形态能力 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.dNBbI0feV4Bb7xuR]{Defensive Quills}以近战徒手打击或非触及近战打击命中你的生物，会受到等同于你等级一半的穿刺伤害（最低 1），并需针对你的力量 DC 进行一次基础反射豁免。

进化能力 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.hR98QHVHLFFTSGHE]{Protective Armor}你穿着带电的重型护甲。你从护甲获得的 AC 物品加值提高至 +6，你的最大敏捷调整值降低至 +0，且你的速度降低至 20 英尺。

Whenever a foe critically fails an attack roll against you with a melee unarmed attack, or an adjacent foe critically fails any melee attack roll against you, they take 2 electricity damage. This damage increase to 4 if you’re an expert in power DCs, 6 if you’re a master in power DCs, and 8 if you’re legendary in power DCs. They then become shocked for 1 round.

Lemiure、Lemurux 与 Lughemur

元素 光

属性调整值 Str -1, Dex +3, Con +2, Int +0, Wis +4, Cha +1

抗力 death, force, light

速度 25 feet

近战 1 爪击（agile, finesse, 仅在进化后触及 10 feet）；伤害 1d4 slashing（仅在进化后为 1d6 slashing）

进化状态 帮助 lemiure 从众多具有不同观点与生活经历的人身上学习。

元素能力 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.lts8ZMb504M6RO4l]{Prism Power}当你的敌人被显映于光中时，你的光力量会造成额外伤害。当一个生物具有显映的状态时，你对该生物施展光力量造成的火伤害获得 +1 状态加值；若你在力量 DC 上为专家则提高至 +3，若为大师则为 +4，若为传奇则为 +5。

形态能力 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.LG9fvg69MrIKhwXq]{Prism’s Perception}你头上的棱镜帮助精炼你周遭的视域并将其折射进你的视野，使你更容易发现事物。你在察觉上为专家，并且在第 9 等级时，你在察觉上成为大师。

进化能力 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.PdJxytvwDhRdoQR2]{Prismatic Cloak}你身后拖曳的彩虹色斗篷保护你免受伤害，尤其是来自那些被你光力量炫目的存在。你获得对由被你光力量炫目的生物所造成的物理伤害的抗力 5。该抗力在等级 18 时提高至 6。

Elemental Ability @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.lts8ZMb504M6RO4l]{Prism Power}When your foe is limned in light, your light powers deal additional damage. While a creature has the limned condition, you gain a +1 status bonus to fire damage with light powers against that creature; this increases to +3 if you’re an expert in power DCs, +4 if you’re a master in power DCs, and +5 if you’re legendary in power DCs.

Form Ability @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.LG9fvg69MrIKhwXq]{Prism’s Perception}The prism on your head helps refine the sights around you and refract them into your view, making it easy for you to spot things. You’re an expert in Perception, and at 9th level, you become a master in Perception.

Evolution Ability @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.PdJxytvwDhRdoQR2]{Prismatic Cloak}The rainbow-colored cloak trailing behind you protects you from harm, especially from those dazzled by your light. You gain resistance 5 to physical damage dealt by creatures dazzled by your light powers. This resistance increases to 6 at level 18.

Sanditt.name: 桑迪特 Sanditt
Sanditt.description:
桑迪特、桑德玛与桑德拉克

元素 大地

属性调整值 Str +1, Dex +2, Con +3, Int -1, Wis +4, Cha +0

Eldamon语言 Petran

Eldamon生命值 8

Eldamon技能 表演、隐匿、生存

Eldamon豁免 强韧

感官 弱光视野

抗力 大地、电击、火、传送

弱点 空气、植物、音波、水、木材

速度 25尺

近战 1 颚；伤害 1d6挥砍（仅进化时为1d8挥砍）

近战 1 尾巴（灵巧、娴熟、仅进化时触及10尺）；伤害 1d4钝击（仅进化时为1d6钝击）

进化状态 帮助桑迪特克服他们的害羞，并演出一场真正精彩的小品或木偶戏。

元素能力 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.Eum7xZo3Pfou7CoZ]{Protrusive Cover}你的大地之力从体内渗出，使你能够为盟友提供额外掩蔽。每当你在你的空间内让盟友获得针对一次穿过你空间发动的攻击的次等掩蔽时，你给予他们的AC获得+2环境加值，而非通常的AC+1环境加值。

形态能力 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.erZ78Orbjl8zoZ7y]{Sand Shroud}当你被命中时，你用沙砾裹住自身，使你在后续攻击中更难被看清。若一名生物以一次打击命中你，其冲击会扬起一层沙幕，使你直到该生物回合结束前都因沙幕而处于隐蔽。

进化能力 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.orLKj7nXd5j6REbo]{Puppet Tail}你的尾巴可以引诱敌人疏忽并分散其注意力。以一个单动作，你可以尝试一次表演检定来对抗一名生物的察觉DC；成功则使其直到你下个回合结束前陷入措手不及。若你尝试一次尾巴打击，在结算该打击后，除非该打击为大成功或大失败中的失败，否则目标直到你回合结束前陷入措手不及。当一名敌人因你的尾巴而措手不及时，你的移动不会触发该敌人基于移动的反应动作（如反应打击及类似反应）。

Melee 1 tail (agile, finesse, reach 10 feet when evolved only); Damage 1d4 bludgeoning (1d6 bludgeoning when evolved only)

Evolution Condition Helping sanditt overcome their shyness and put on a truly wonderful skit or puppet show.

Elemental Ability @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.Eum7xZo3Pfou7CoZ]{Protrusive Cover}Your earth power seeps out of you, allowing you to grant your allies additional cover. Whenever you give your allies lesser cover against an attack made through your space, you grant them a +2 circumstance bonus to AC instead of the usual +1 circumstance bonus to AC.

Form Ability @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.erZ78Orbjl8zoZ7y]{Sand Shroud}When you’re hit, you shroud yourself with sand that conceals you from follow-up attacks. If a creature hits you with a Strike, the impact launches a shroud of sand, causing you to become concealed by the sand until the end of that creature’s turn.

Evolution Ability @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.orLKj7nXd5j6REbo]{Puppet Tail}Your tail can lure foes off guard and distract them. As a single action, you can attempt a Performance check against a creature’s Perception DC, causing them to become off-guard until the end of your next turn on a success. If you attempt a tail Strike, after resolving the Strike, the target becomes off-guard until the end of your turn unless the Strike was a critical failure. While a foe is off-guard due to your tail, your movements don’t trigger reactions from that foe based on movement (such as Reactive Strikes and similar reactions).

Skolld.description:
斯科尔德、阿玛里姆与芬里斯

元素 冰

属性调整值 Str +1, Dex +2, Con +3, Int -1, Wis +4, Cha +0

Eldamon语言 Cryan

Eldamon生命值 6

抗力 cold, plant, sonic, 时代, wood

弱点 body, earth, fire, metal

速度 25 feet

近战 1 颌骨（agile, finesse；仅在进化时触及 10 feet）；伤害 1d4 cold（仅在进化时为 1d6 cold）

近战 1 爪击（仅在进化时触及 10 feet）；伤害 1d6 slashing（仅在进化时为 1d8 slashing）

进化状态 帮助斯科尔德守护对其最重要之物。

元素能力 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.gBUUThIKgqNsZgZS]{Clinging Frost}你唤起的冰、霜与雪会残留并黏附在其目标上。进行一次交互动作以降低冻结状态的数值时，除非该生物正处于冻结 1，否则不会将冻结数值降低到 1 以下；随后，该生物对 clinging frost 获得 1 分钟的暂时免疫。

形态能力 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.PxzT9stuFOCAHGv3]{Interposing Guardian}你会挡在你想保护之人的攻击路径上。当你希望如此时，你会对穿过你空间的攻击提供标准掩蔽，而非较小掩蔽。

进化能力 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.ShmfYYT4xc6rhBXf]{Frozen Soul}在必要时，你会紧抓意识以保护对你重要之物。当你因伤害而被降至 0 生命值时，你改为仍保持在 1 生命值。之后，你在 1 小时内无法从 frozen soul 中获益。

Elemental Ability @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.gBUUThIKgqNsZgZS]{Clinging Frost}The ice, frost, and snow you call forth lingers and sticks to its targets. An Interact action to reduce the value of the frozen condition doesn’t reduce the frozen value below 1 unless the creature is frozen 1; the creature then becomes temporarily immune to clinging frost for 1 minute.

Form Ability @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.PxzT9stuFOCAHGv3]{Interposing Guardian}You get in the way of attacks against those you wish to protect. You provide standard cover instead of lesser cover against attacks through your space when you wish to do so.

Evolution Ability @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.ShmfYYT4xc6rhBXf]{Frozen Soul}You cling to consciousness when necessary to protect what matters to you. When you are dropped to 0 Hit Points by damage, you remain at 1 Hit Point instead. Afterward, you can’t benefit from frozen soul for 1 hour.

Puhide.name: 普海德 Puhide
Puhide.description:
Puhide、Anguillake与Qinglongue

元素 水

属性调整值 Str +1, Dex +3, Con +2, Int +0, Wis +4, Cha -1

Eldamon语言 Thalassic

Eldamon生命值 6

Eldamon技能 Acrobatics, Athletics, Stealth

Eldamon豁免 Reflex

感官 弱光视野

抗力 火, 水

弱点 electricity, plant, wood

速度 20 feet, swim 25 feet

近战 1 jaws (agile, finesse, 仅在进化时触及 10 feet); 伤害 1d4 piercing（仅在进化时为 1d6 piercing）

进化状态 帮助puhide接纳并克服他们的紧张与恐惧。

元素能力 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.rXSomKuwkrJ9eZL6]{Sinuous Backflow}当你使用一个区域水系力量时，若你在该区域内，或你的区域水系力量以你的方格为起点（例如线状或锥形（区域）力量），你可以选择让你的力量使你移动任意一个与你的盟友可选择移动的相同距离。然而，你移动的方向与其他生物相反。例如，这意味着你会从高潮线状或锥形（区域）向后、远离地移动，从而与你被向后推开的任何敌人拉开更远距离；并会朝向低潮线状或锥形（区域）移动，从而更接近被拉向你的敌人。若该区域力量是爆发或散发，且以你为中心，则无论潮汐如何，你都可以朝任意你选择的方向移动。

形态能力 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.6baOd78xOANAHjPq]{Slippery Eel}当你在躲藏以避开敌人时，敌人尤其难以抓住你或找到你。你在用于逃脱的检定与用于躲藏的隐匿检定上获得+2环境加值。若你在一次用于逃脱的检定中掷出成功，则改为大成功或大失败。

进化能力 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.AARylStYyPWyUNoV]{Dragon Soul}你的自信涌动，赋予你巨龙之魂以驱散你的恐惧。你对抗恐惧效果的豁免获得+1环境加值。当你对抗恐惧效果进行意志豁免并掷出成功时，改为大成功或大失败。此外，每当你获得惊惧（状态）时，将其数值减少1。

力量进度

Puhide, Anguillake, and Qinglongue

Element Water

Attribute Modifiers Str +1, Dex +3, Con +2, Int +0, Wis +4, Cha -1

Eldamon Language Thalassic

Eldamon Hit Points 6

Eldamon Skills Acrobatics, Athletics, Stealth

Eldamon Saving Throw Reflex

Senses low-light vision

Resistance fire, water

Weaknesses electricity, plant, wood

Speed 20 feet, swim 25 feet

Melee 1 jaws (agile, finesse, reach 10 feet when evolved only); Damage 1d4 piercing (1d6 piercing when evolved only)

Evolution Condition Helping puhide accept and work through their nerves and fear.

Elemental Ability @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.rXSomKuwkrJ9eZL6]{Sinuous Backflow}When you use an area water power, if you’re in the area, or your area water power originates from your square (such as a line or cone area power), you can choose to let your power move you any of the same distances your allies can choose to move. However, you move in the opposite direction as the other creatures. For example, this means you move back and away from a high tide line or cone, further distancing yourself from any foes who were pushed back, and toward a low tide line or cone, further approaching foes who were pulled toward you. If the area power is a burst or an emanation, and it’s centered on you, you can move in whichever direction you choose regardless of the tide.

Form Ability @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.6baOd78xOANAHjPq]{Slippery Eel}It’s especially difficult for your foes to hold onto you or find you when you’re hiding from them. You gain a +2 circumstance bonus to checks to Escape and to Stealth checks to Hide. If you roll a success on a check to Escape, you get a critical success instead.

Evolution Ability @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.AARylStYyPWyUNoV]{Dragon Soul}Your confidence surges, granting you the soul of a dragon to dispel your fears. You gain a +1 circumstance bonus to saving throws against fear effects. When you roll a success at a Will save against a fear effect, you get a critical success instead. In addition, anytime you gain the frightened condition, reduce its value by 1.

Iognu.name: 伊奥格努 Iognu
Iognu.description:
Iognu、Wildebuzz与Shockonno

元素 电击

属性调整值 Str +2, Dex +1, Con +3, Int +0, Wis +4, Cha - 1

Eldamon语言 Voltan

Eldamon生命值 6

Eldamon技能 Acrobatics, Athletics, Survival

Eldamon豁免 Fortitude

感官 弱光视野

抗力 空气，电击，金属

弱点 大地，精神，传送

速度 25尺

近战 1 角（agile, finesse；仅在进化时触及10尺）；伤害 1d4 电击（仅在进化时为1d6 电击）

近战 1 脚；伤害 1d6 钝击（仅在进化时为1d8 钝击）

进化状态 帮助iognu品尝一场壮丽的风暴。

元素能力 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.GCGJ9Rpz92G2uLg9]{Rampaging}你的电荷在敌人之间横冲直撞，使其在遭受电击伤害后仍有时会黏附其上。当一名因你的元素力量而处于震慑状态的敌人从你的元素力量承受电击伤害时，该敌人必须进行一次DC 5纯骰检定。若成功，则其如常失去震慑状态；若失败，则其保留电荷并仍处于震慑状态。然而，这不会延长其震慑状态的持续时间。

形态能力 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.bICCgJdrrAciyjOe]{Static Fur}你的皮毛会在你冲锋并四处横冲直撞时聚集电能。如果你在你的回合中至少花费三个动作来Stride，且该回合没有使用一个力量，则你在回合结束时变为带电。

进化能力 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.kcz5gHrGo78HMkaE]{Lightning Rod Tail} 当一个电击效果以你30尺内的一名生物为目标或其包含一条在你30尺内的线时，若它本可以以你为目标或将该线瞄准以命中你，则你可以选择尝试一次反制检定，使用你的力量DC - 10作为你的反制调整值，并以你等级的一半（向上取整）作为你的反制等级。若你成功，你不是终止该效果，而是迫使其以你为目标，或将其瞄准以使其包含你。若存在多种方式可以如此做，则只要他们以你为目标或包含你，效果的发起者就做出所有其他决定。

属性调整值进程

进阶训练（5th） Str +3

, Dex +2, Con +3, Int +1, Wis +4, Cha +0

Eldamon进化（11th） Str +4, Dex +2, Con +4, Int +1, Wis +5, Cha +0

巅峰训练（15th） Str +4, Dex +3, Con +5, Int +2, Wis +5, Cha +1

最终属性提升（17th） Str +4, Dex +3, Con +5, Int +2, Wis +6, Cha +1

Iognu, Wildebuzz, and Shockonno

Element Electricity

Attribute Modifiers Str +2, Dex +1, Con +3, Int +0, Wis +4, Cha - 1

Eldamon Language Voltan

Eldamon Hit Points 6

Eldamon Skills Acrobatics, Athletics, Survival

Eldamon Saving Throw Fortitude

Senses low-light vision

Resistance air, electricity, metal

Weaknesses earth, mental, teleportation

Speed 25 feet

Melee 1 horn (agile, finesse; reach 10 feet when evolved only); Damage 1d4 electricity (1d6 electricity when evolved only)

Melee 1 foot; Damage 1d6 bludgeoning (1d8 bludgeoning when evolved only)

Evolution Condition Helping iognu taste a magnificent storm.

Elemental Ability @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.GCGJ9Rpz92G2uLg9]{Rampaging}Your electric charges rampage through your foes, allowing them to occasionally cling even after they suffer electricity damage. When a foe shocked from your elemental powers takes electricity damage from your elemental powers, the foe must attempt a DC 5 flat check. On a success, they lose the shocked condition as normal, whereas on a failure, they retain the charge and remain shocked. However, this doesn’t extend the duration of their shocked condition.

Form Ability @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.bICCgJdrrAciyjOe]{Static Fur}Your fur gathers up electricity when you charge and rampage around. If you spend at least three of your actions on your turn to Stride and don’t use a power on that turn, you become charged at the end of the turn.

Evolution Ability @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.kcz5gHrGo78HMkaE]{Lightning Rod Tail} When an electricity effect targets a creature within 30 feet of you or includes a line within 30 feet of you, if it could have targeted you or aimed the line to hit you, you can choose to attempt a counteract check using your power DC - 10 as your counteract modifier and half your level (rounded up) as your counteract level. If you succeed, instead of ending the effect, you force it to target you, or to aim to include you. If there are several ways to do so, the originator makes all other decisions as long as they target or include you.

Potfox.name: 陶罐狐 Potfox
Potfox.description:
壶狐、坎寇德隆与坎卡温

元素 力场

属性调整值 Str -1, Dex +2, Con +3, Int +1, Wis +4, Cha +0

Eldamon语言 以太兰语

Eldamon生命值 6

Eldamon技能 Athletics, Cooking 学识, Intimidation

Eldamon豁免 Fortitude

感官 弱光视野

抗力 力场，灵体

弱点 death，光

速度 25尺

近战 1 leg（agile, finesse, 仅在进化时触及10尺）；伤害 1d4 bludgeoning（仅在进化时为1d6 bludgeoning）

进化状态 帮助壶狐成为拥有许多配方的酿造大师。

元素能力 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.Rx74fcdV2tZuPjMm]{Stir the Pot} 当你使用力场之力重新定位一个敌人时，你可以让他们再多移动一点。每当你的力场之力允许你将一个敌人重新定位10尺或更多时，你可以额外将其重新定位5尺。若你的力场之力允许你将一个敌人重新定位30尺或更多，则你改为额外将其重新定位10尺。

形态能力 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.WrJfzqOzfZLiSZMs]{Have Pot, Will Travel} 你的形态的一部分是一口活的锅，你可以用它来保护自己。以一个单动作，你可以 Retreat Into your Pot。若你如此做，你获得+2 AC环境加值并陷入immobilized。这些效果持续到你下个回合结束，不过你可以用一个单动作提前结束该效果。

进化能力 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.azH8AiO8XAJDkuRV]{Foxforce} 你舞动的狐之力鬼火会短暂显露隐藏的生物，效果类似于妖精之火。当你使用力场之力进行一次强力攻击掷骰并命中一个生物且其受到力场伤害时，或一个生物在对抗你的力场之力的豁免中失败且其受到力场伤害时，若该生物为invisible，则其改为隐蔽；若其为可见，则其不能成为隐蔽。该效果持续到你下个回合结束。

属性调整值进程

高级训练（5级） Str +0, Dex +3, Con +3, Int +2, Wis +4, Cha +1

Potfox, Kankoldron, and Kankawen

Element Force

Attribute Modifiers Str -1, Dex +2, Con +3, Int +1, Wis +4, Cha +0

Eldamon Language Aetheran

Eldamon Hit Points 6

Eldamon Skills Athletics, Cooking Lore, Intimidation

Eldamon Saving Throw Fortitude

Senses low-light vision

Resistance force, spirit

Weaknesses death, light

Speed 25 feet

Melee 1 leg (agile, finesse, reach 10 feet when evolved only); Damage 1d4 bludgeoning (1d6 bludgeoning when evolved only)

Evolution Condition Helping potfox become a brewmaster with many recipes.

Elemental Ability @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.Rx74fcdV2tZuPjMm]{Stir the Pot} When you reposition a foe using your force powers, you can move them just a little bit more. Whenever your force power allows you to reposition a foe 10 feet or more, you can reposition them 5 more feet. If your force power allows you to reposition a foe 30 feet or more, you can reposition them 10 more feet instead.

Form Ability @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.WrJfzqOzfZLiSZMs]{Have Pot, Will Travel} Part of your form is a living pot, which you can use for protection. As a single action, you can Retreat Into your Pot. If you do, you gain a +2 circumstance bonus to AC and are immobilized. These effects last until the end of your next turn, though you can end the effect early with a single action.

Evolution Ability @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.azH8AiO8XAJDkuRV]{Foxforce} Your dancing wisps of fox force briefly reveal hidden creatures similarly to faerie fire. When you hit a creature with a power attack roll with a force power and it takes force damage, or a creature fails its saving throw against your force power and it takes force damage, if the creature was invisible, it becomes concealed instead, and if it was visible, it can’t be concealed. This effect lasts until the end of your next turn.

Coolibou.name: 酷利布牛 Coolibou
Coolibou.description:
库利波、兰吉弗罗兹与卡里博瑞亚斯

元素 冰

属性调整值 Str +0, Dex +2, Con +3, Int -1, Wis +4, Cha +1

Eldamon语言 Cryan

Eldamon生命值 6

Eldamon技能 Athletics, Intimidation, Survival

Eldamon豁免 Fortitude

感官 弱光视野

抗力 cold, plant, sonic, time, wood

弱点 body, earth, fire, metal

速度 25 feet

近战 1 antler (agile, finesse; evolved only时触及 10 feet); 伤害 1d4 cold（evolved only时为 1d6 cold）

进化状态 帮助库利波赠送并收取美妙的礼物。

元素能力 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.cKpzW0DNqbOLHCnR]{Deep Accumulation}当你的冰之力量在一个生物身上累积“冻结”状态时，“冻结”状态的最大值提高 2（起始为 7，在 20 级时最大提高至 12）。

形态能力 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.RmH7yV0Ka43jWeRM]{Snow Fur}你蓬松如雪的毛皮会随着它们所累积的寒意而给予你对抗生物攻击的保护。当一个生物因你的冰之力量而冻结值达到 3 或更高时，你对该生物的攻击获得 AC +1 环境加值；当其冻结值达到 6 或更高时提高至 +2，达到 9 或更高时为 +3，达到 12 或更高时为 +4。

进化能力 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.U7bJ1OMkU5j0JOn7]{Portal Antlers}你可以使用你双角之间的元素冰传送门来瞄准你的冰之力量。为你的任意冰之力量选择你鹿角 10- foot 触及范围内的任意空间作为其起源点。这不仅在大多数情况下使你能有效将其射程提高 10 feet，还能让你更有利地布置区域效果。

Coolibou, Rangifroze, and Cariboreas

Element Ice

Attribute Modifiers Str +0, Dex +2, Con +3, Int -1, Wis +4, Cha +1

Eldamon Language Cryan

Eldamon Hit Points 6

Eldamon Skills Athletics, Intimidation, Survival

Eldamon Saving Throw Fortitude

Senses low-light vision

Resistance cold, plant, sonic, time, wood

Weaknesses body, earth, fire, metal

Speed 25 feet

Melee 1 antler (agile, finesse; reach 10 feet when evolved only); Damage 1d4 cold (1d6 cold when evolved only)

Evolution Condition Helping coolibou give and receive wonderful gifts.

Elemental Ability @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.cKpzW0DNqbOLHCnR]{Deep Accumulation}When your ice powers accumulate the frozen condition on a creature, the maximum value for the frozen condition increases by 2 (starting at 7, to a maximum of 12 at 20th level).

Form Ability @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.RmH7yV0Ka43jWeRM]{Snow Fur}Your fluffy snowlike fur grants you protection against creatures’ attacks the more their chill accumulates. You gain a +1 circumstance bonus to AC against a creature’s attacks when they are frozen 3 or more from your ice powers, which increases to +2 when they are frozen 6 or more, +3 when they are frozen 9 or more, and +4 when they are frozen 12 or more.

Evolution Ability @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.U7bJ1OMkU5j0JOn7]{Portal Antlers}You can use the elemental ice portal between your antlers to aim your ice powers. Choose any space within your antlers’ 10- foot reach as the origin point for any of your ice powers. This not only allows you to effectively increase their range by 10 feet in most cases, but also allows you to position area effects more advantageously.

Phidi.name: 菲迪 Phidi
Phidi.description:
Phidi、Caduceon与Colubrio

元素 生命

属性调整值 Str -1, Dex +3, Con +2, Int +1, Wis +4, Cha +0

Eldamon语言 Jyoti

Eldamon生命值 8

Eldamon技能 Acrobatics, Medicine（不需要手或医者工具）, Stealth

Eldamon豁免 意志

感官 弱光视野

抗力 光、活力（由于它不是不死生物，活力通常无法伤害它）

弱点 黑暗、死亡、阴影

速度 25英尺

近战 1 爪击（獠牙（agile, finesse; 仅在进化时触及10英尺）; 伤害 1d4 穿刺外加 1 额外活力（仅在进化时为 1d6 穿刺外加 1 额外活力）

进化状态 帮助phidi发现一次真正的医学突破。

元素能力 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.itvQjsVs8RILKYEN]{Caduceus Flow}当你帮助他人时，溢出的生命能量也会保护你。每当你使用一个使一名或多名盟友受益、但不使你自身受益的生命力量时，你获得1点临时生命值，持续到你下个回合开始。若你在力量DC上为专家，则提升为2点临时生命值；若为大师，则为3点临时生命值；若为传奇，则为4点临时生命值。

形态能力 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.LaoF7fcqDRR4rYCx]{Double Senses}即使它不可见，你的生命力复制体也会协助你的感官。你在察觉上为专家，并在第9等级时成为察觉大师。

进化能力 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.QeutdbOGPJliW7Hg]{Crystallize Life}你将结晶化的生命能量储存在沿身体分布的金色宝石中。并且当你处于相位内，或在一次遭遇中你首次相位内时，你会耗尽部分储存的能量以获得等同于你等级的临时生命值，持续1轮。

属性调整值进程

进阶训练（5th） Str +0, Dex +3, Con +3, Int +2, Wis +4, Cha +1

Eldamon进化（11th） Str +0, Dex +4, Con +4, Int +2, Wis +5, Cha +1

最终属性提升（17th） Str +1, Dex +5, Con +4, Int +3, Wis +6, Cha +2

Phidi, Caduceon, and Colubrio

Element Life

Attribute Modifiers Str -1, Dex +3, Con +2, Int +1, Wis +4, Cha +0

Eldamon Language Jyoti

Eldamon Hit Points 8

Eldamon Skills Acrobatics, Medicine (doesn’t need hands or healer’s tools), Stealth

Eldamon Saving Throw Will

Senses low-light vision

Resistance light, vitality (since it isn’t undead, it can’t normally be harmed by vitality)

Weaknesses darkness, death, shadow

Speed 25 feet

Melee 1 claw (fangs (agile, finesse; reach 10 feet when evolved only); Damage 1d4 piercing plus 1 additional vitality (1d6 piercing plus 1 additional vitality when evolved only)

Evolution Condition Helping phidi discover a true medical breakthrough.

Elemental Ability @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.itvQjsVs8RILKYEN]{Caduceus Flow}When you help others, the overflowing life energy protects you as well. Whenever you use a life power that benefits one or more allies, but does not benefit yourself, you gain 1 temporary Hit Point until the beginning of your next turn. This increases to 2 temporary Hit Points if you’re an expert in power DC, 3 temporary Hit Points if you’re a master in power DC, and 4 temporary Hit Points if you’re legendary in power DC.

Form Ability @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.LaoF7fcqDRR4rYCx]{Double Senses}Even when it isn’t visible, your life force duplicate assists your senses. You’re an expert in Perception, and at 9th level, you become a master in Perception.

Evolution Ability @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.QeutdbOGPJliW7Hg]{Crystallize Life}You store crystallized life energy in golden jewels along your body. and you’re phased in or when you first phase in during an encounter, you deplete some of the stored energy to gain temporary Hit Points equal to your level, which last for 1 round.

Kitopaz.name: 基托帕兹 Kitopaz
Kitopaz.description:
Kitopaz、Kitefnut 与 Qitophet

元素 大地

属性调整值 Str +0, Dex +2, Con +3, Int -1, Wis +4, Cha +1

Eldamon语言 Petran

Eldamon生命值 8

Eldamon技能 威吓、隐匿、生存

Eldamon豁免 强韧

感官 弱光视野

抗力 大地、电击、火、传送

弱点 空气、植物、音波、水、木

速度 25尺

近战 1 爪击（灵巧，精准；仅在进化后触及 10尺）；伤害 1d4 挥砍（仅在进化后为 1d6 挥砍）

进化条件 帮助kitopaz获得闪亮的东西，并在一切闪亮之道上抵达巅峰启迪。

元素能力 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.N6ax9EnOe0yNIUZ4]{Strength of the Earth}大地本身为你提供充溢的能量，保护你免受伤害。在遭遇中，若你在地面上开始你的回合，并与岩石或土质表面直接接触，你获得1点临时生命值，持续至你下个回合开始。若你的力量DC为专家则提升至2点临时生命值；若为大师则为3点临时生命值；若为传奇则为4点临时生命值。

形态能力 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.p6o2wewulQ1HOgok]{Regal Nemes}你闪亮的头饰一劳永逸地证明你真正高贵而华美，同时保护你免受试图窃取你主权的效果影响。你对抗情绪效果，以及施加困惑或被控制（状态）的效果之豁免检定获得+1环境加值。若你在对抗此类效果的豁免检定中掷出成功，则改为大成功或大失败中的大成功。

进化能力 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.rBD1MWnMSFTX6WQa]{Crystalline Guard}遍布你全身的诸多水晶让大地能量能轻易流经你，并储存在水晶之中以在需要时释放。在你的回合结束时，你可以选择耗尽你的能量，使你的AC获得+2环境加值，持续至你下个回合开始。若你如此做，在你至少刷新三次以补足缺失的能量之前，你不能再次这么做。由于你在一次遭遇后会立刻刷新，你也能迅速补充你的水晶守卫。

Kitopaz, Kitefnut, and Qitophet

Element Earth

Attribute Modifiers Str +0, Dex +2, Con +3, Int -1, Wis +4, Cha +1

Eldamon Language Petran

Eldamon Hit Points 8

Eldamon Skills Intimidation, Stealth, Survival

Eldamon Saving Throw Fortitude

Senses low-light vision

Resistance earth, electricity, fire, teleportation

Weaknesses air, plant, sonic, water, wood

Speed 25 feet

Melee 1 claw (agile, finesse; reach 10 feet when evolved only); Damage 1d4 slashing (1d6 slashing when evolved only)

Evolution Condition Helping kitopaz obtain shiny things and reach peak enlightenment in the art of all that is shiny.

Elemental Ability @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.N6ax9EnOe0yNIUZ4]{Strength of the Earth}The earth itself provides you with overflowing energy that protects you from harm. During an encounter, if you start your turn on the ground, in direct contact with a rock or earthen surface, you gain 1 temporary Hit Point until the beginning of your next turn. This increases to 2 temporary Hit Points if you’re an expert in power DC, 3 temporary Hit Points if you’re a master in power DC, and 4 temporary Hit Points if you’re legendary in power DC.

Form Ability @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.p6o2wewulQ1HOgok]{Regal Nemes}Your shiny headdress proves you once and for all as truly regal and magnificent, while protecting you from effects that would seek to steal your sovereignty. You gain a +1 circumstance bonus to saving throws against emotion effects and effects that apply the confused or controlled condition. If you roll a success on a saving throw against such an effect, you get a critical success instead.

Evolution Ability @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.rBD1MWnMSFTX6WQa]{Crystalline Guard}The many crystals throughout your body allow earth energy to flow through you easily and store within the crystals to release when needed. At the end of your turn, you can choose to deplete your energy to gain a +2 circumstance bonus to your AC until the beginning of your next turn. If you do, you can’t do so again until you refresh at least three times to replenish the missing energy. Since you refresh instantly after an encounter, you can also replenish your crystalline guard swiftly.

Anairx.name: 阿奈尔克斯 Anairx
Anairx.description:
Anairx、Aeshnote 与 Aniscroll

元素 空气

属性调整值 Str +1, Dex +3, Con +2, Int +0, Wis +4, Cha -1

Eldamon 语言 苏苏兰语

Eldamon 生命值 4

Eldamon 技能 Athletics, Acrobatics, Stealth

Eldamon 豁免 Reflex

感官 弱光视野

抗力 air, body, earth, plant, wood

弱点 cold, electricity, metal, teleportation

速度 10 feet, fly 25 feet

近战 1 foot（agile, finesse；仅在进化时触及 20 feet）；伤害 1d4 piercing（仅在进化时为 1d6 piercing）

进化状态 帮助 anairx 找到一个真正非凡、值得阅读的故事，一则在根本层面与其产生共鸣的传奇。

元素能力 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.1TNMWrMatWAjRcjx]{Air’s Reach}你以空气之翼将力量传递得更远。你具有射程（以一定 feet 数计）之空气力量，其射程额外延长 50%。这不会影响区域的大小，例如线状或锥状的长度，但它确实允许你将具有射程的区域效果放置在离你更远的位置。

形态能力 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.vc14aj6C4y3UUIKz]{Paper Folding}你可以折叠自己，从而轻松通过狭窄区域。你可以如同你的体型小了两级一般穿过狭窄空间（若你为中型或更小，则视为超小型生物；若你为大型，则视为小型生物；若你为巨型，则视为中型生物；若你为超巨型，则视为大型生物）。

进化能力 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.tcoXGM3JSQXogHoF]{Parchment Furling}你可以像羊皮纸一样卷起与展开身体，使你能轻松抓住多个物体或生物，并延长你的触及。通过展开并延伸自身，你的 foot 触及增加至 20 feet（已反映在其数据中）。此外，你的六只翅膀与主体各自都能持握一个你所擒抱的中型或更小生物，不过若你没有至少两只翅膀空闲，你便无法 Fly。只要你至少有一只翅膀或你的身体空闲，你就可以用它们来 Grab an Edge。这不会让你同时擒抱超过一个生物，而只是让你能持握的生物数量比通常更多。

Elemental Ability @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.1TNMWrMatWAjRcjx]{Air’s Reach}You carry your powers across greater distances with wings of air. Your air powers that have a range within a certain number of feet have their range extended by an additional 50%. This has no effect on the size of an area, such as the length of a line or cone, but it does allow you to place an area effect that has a range at a further distance from you.

Form Ability @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.vc14aj6C4y3UUIKz]{Paper Folding}You can fold yourself in order to easily fit through narrow areas. You can fit through narrow spaces as if you were two sizes smaller (a Tiny creature if you’re Medium or smaller, a Small creature if you’re Large, a Medium creature if you’re Huge, and a Large creature if you’re Gargantuan).

Evolution Ability @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.tcoXGM3JSQXogHoF]{Parchment Furling}You can furl and unfurl your body like parchment, allowing you to grab onto multiple objects or creatures with ease and extending your reach. By unfurling itself and extending, your foot’s reach increases to 20 feet (already reflected in its statistics). Additionally, your six wings and your main body can each hold a Medium or smaller creature you Grapple, though if you don’t have at least two wings free, you can’t Fly. As long as you have at least one wing or your body free, you can use them to Grab an Edge. This doesn’t allow you to Grapple more than a single creature at once, only to hold onto more creatures than normal.

Centesla.name: 森特斯拉 Centesla
Centesla.description:
百特斯拉、电容足与介电脚

元素 电击

属性调整值 Str -1, Dex +3, Con +2, Int +1, Wis +4, Cha +0

Eldamon语言 沃尔坦语

Eldamon生命值 6

Eldamon技能 特技动作、隐秘、生存

Eldamon豁免 反射

感官 弱光视野

抗力 空气、电击、金属

弱点 大地、精神、传送

速度 25尺

近战 1 尾巴（灵活、娴熟；仅在进化时触及10尺）；伤害 1d4 电击（仅在进化时为1d6 电击）

进化状态 帮助百特斯拉满足他们的完美主义。

元素能力 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.Qdf40NoED5Cbne6q]{分段电容器}你将你的电荷分段，从而使你拥有更高的容量。你可以变为带电至带电4，而非带电3。每10分钟1次，当你处于带电2，且将从一个电击力量获得1点电荷时，你改为变为带电4而非带电3；若你在使用该力量前并非已处于带电2，则此效果不生效。

形态能力 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.dzdOBufG2Rg1lYQZ]{这么多腿}由于你拥有极端数量的腿，让你难以被击倒至倒地。你在对抗会使你倒地的效果时，于强韧与反射豁免及DC上获得+4环境加值。

进化能力 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.hLRE2LmdivhosBTM]{恒定电弧}只要你处于带电状态，你的电容器就会射出多余的闪电箭。任何在其回合结束时与您相邻的敌人，承受等同于你带电值两倍的电击伤害；该伤害不会使其失去震慑状态。在15级时，此伤害提升为你带电值的三倍。

属性调整值进程

进阶训练（5级） Str +0, Dex +3, Con +3, Int +2, Wis +4, Cha +1

Eldamon进化（11级） Str +0, Dex +4, Con +4, Int +2, Wis +5, Cha +1

Centesla, Capacipod, and Dielectripede

Element Electricity

Attribute Modifiers Str -1, Dex +3, Con +2, Int +1, Wis +4, Cha +0

Eldamon Language Voltan

Eldamon Hit Points 6

Eldamon Skills Acrobatics, Stealth, Survival

Eldamon Saving Throw Reflex

Senses low-light vision

Resistance air, electricity, metal

Weaknesses earth, mental, teleportation

Speed 25 feet

Melee 1 tail (agile, finesse; reach 10 feet when evolved only); Damage 1d4 electricity (1d6 electricity when evolved only)

Evolution Condition Helping centesla satisfy their completionism.

Elemental Ability @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.Qdf40NoED5Cbne6q]{Segmented Capacitor}You’ve segmented off your electric charge, granting you higher capacity. You can become charged up to charged 4, instead of charged 3. Once per 10 minutes, when you are charged 2 and would gain a single charge from an electricity power, you become charged 4 instead of charged 3; this has no effect if you weren’t already charged 2 before using the power.

Form Ability @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.dzdOBufG2Rg1lYQZ]{So Many Legs}Due to your extreme number of legs, it’s difficult to knock you prone. You gain a +4 circumstance bonus to Fortitude and Reflex saves and DCs against effects that would knock you prone.

Evolution Ability @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.hLRE2LmdivhosBTM]{Constant Bolts}As long as you’re charged, your capacitors shoot off superfluous lightning bolts. Any foe that ends its turn adjacent to you takes an amount of electricity damage equal to twice your charged value; this damage doesn’t make it lose the shocked condition. At 15th level, this damage increases to three times your charged value.

Ophini.name: 奥菲尼 Ophini
Ophini.description:
奥菲尼、奥法尼尔与加尔加洛斯

元素 火

属性调整值 Str -1, Dex +3, Con +2, Int +0, Wis +4, Cha +1

Eldamon语言 Pyric

Eldamon生命值 6

Eldamon技能 杂技、威吓、隐秘

Eldamon豁免 意志

感官 firesight、弱光视野、smokesight

抗力 火、金属、植物、木材

弱点 寒冷、大地、水

速度 25尺

近战 1轮（灵巧、娴熟；仅在进化时为forceful）；伤害 1d4 火（仅在进化时为1d6 火）

进化状态 帮助奥菲尼看见真正壮丽的景象。

元素能力 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.Nw4Mq1z7lVvvovbJ]{Firesight}你获得smokesight能力，并且你可以在60尺内以模糊感官感知火以及带有火焰（特征）的生物与效果。

形态能力 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.TUbEo0KEpz1vPX47]{Eyes on the Back of Your Wheel}由于你有许多眼睛，对等级等于或低于你的夹击生物，你不会陷入措手不及。然而，它们仍然可以帮助其盟友进行夹击。

Tairopoof.name: 泰罗噗夫 Tairopoof
Tairopoof.description:
Tairopoof、Nyctairis与Airoptera

元素 空气

属性调整值 Str +0, Dex +3, Con +2, Int +1, Wis +4, Cha -1

Eldamon语言 Sussuran

Eldamon生命值 4

Eldamon技能 Acrobatics, Stealth, Survival

Eldamon豁免 Reflex

感官 弱光视野

抗力 air, body, earth, plant, wood

弱点 cold, electricity, metal, teleportation

速度 10 feet, fly 25 feet

近战 1 爪击（agile, finesse；仅在进化后 触及 10 feet）；伤害 1d4 slashing（仅在进化后为 1d6 slashing）

近战 1 颌骨（finesse，仅在进化后 触及 10 feet）；伤害 1d4 piercing（仅在进化后为 1d6 piercing）

进化状态 帮助tairopoof克服其对自身身体以及吓到他人的焦虑。

元素能力 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.9IuGx5CmbiQ39ILj]{Wind Speed}当你使用你的空气力量来移动时，空气能量会加速你。以空气力量移动时，你的各项速度获得+10-foot状态加值。若你在力量DC上为专家，则提升为+20-foot状态加值；若为大师，则为+30-foot状态加值；若为传奇，则为+40-foot状态加值。

形态能力 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.zcxDnhekhB0UKB7Y]{Air Wings}你的翅膀完全由空气构成，使你在飞行中的机动性显著高于大多数其他生物。你在进行Maneuver in Flight与Arrest a Fall的Acrobatics检定时获得+2环境加值。

进化能力 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.zBfJhio4Zc86GVHx]{Air Unleashed}空气被解放的力量使你能以不受限制的机动性移动。向上飞行对你而言不算困难地形，并且你不必通过下降到地面来结束你的回合，即使你未与使用Melded Phase的eldamon训练师合体亦然。

Tairopoof, Nyctairis, and Airoptera

Element Air

Attribute Modifiers Str +0, Dex +3, Con +2, Int +1, Wis +4, Cha -1

Eldamon Language Sussuran

Eldamon Hit Points 4

Eldamon Skills Acrobatics, Stealth, Survival

Eldamon Saving Throw Reflex

Senses low-light vision

Resistance air, body, earth, plant, wood

Weaknesses cold, electricity, metal, teleportation

Speed 10 feet, fly 25 feet

Melee 1 claw (agile, finesse; reach 10 feet when evolved only); Damage 1d4 slashing (1d6 slashing when evolved only)

Melee 1 jaws (finesse, reach 10 feet when evolved only); Damage 1d4 piercing (1d6 piercing when evolved only)

Evolution Condition Helping tairopoof overcome their anxiety toward their body and scaring others.

Elemental Ability @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.9IuGx5CmbiQ39ILj]{Wind Speed}Air energy speeds you up when using your air powers to move. You gain a +10-foot status bonus to your Speeds while moving with an air power. This increases to a +20-foot status bonus if you’re an expert in power DC, a +30- foot status bonus if you’re a master in power DC, and a +40-foot status bonus if you’re legendary in power DC.

Form Ability @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.zcxDnhekhB0UKB7Y]{Air Wings}Your wings are formed entirely out of air, providing you significantly greater maneuverability in flight than most other creatures. You gain a +2 circumstance bonus to Acrobatics checks to Maneuver in Flight and Arrest a Fall.

Evolution Ability @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.zBfJhio4Zc86GVHx]{Air Unleashed}The unleashed power of air allows you to move with unrestricted mobility. Flying upward isn’t difficult terrain to you, and you don’t have to end the turn by descending to the ground, even if you aren’t combined with an eldamon trainer using Melded Phase.

Peepkin.name: 皮普金 Peepkin
Peepkin.description:
皮普金、葫卫与南瓜骑士

元素 木

属性调整值 Str +0, Dex +3, Con +2, Int -1, Wis +4, Cha +1

艾达蒙语言 Muan

艾达蒙生命值 6

艾达蒙技能 Acrobatics, Intimidation, Stealth

艾达蒙豁免 Reflex

感官 弱光视野

抗力 大地, plant, 时代, 水, wood

弱点 acid, air, cold, fire, poison

速度 25 feet

近战 1 爪击（agile, finesse；仅可在战斗形态中使用）；伤害 1d4 slashing

近战 1 刃臂（finesse, 触及 10 feet, 多用 P；仅可在进化形态中使用）；伤害 1d8 slashing

进化状态 帮助皮普金以真正精彩的装饰庆祝。

元素能力 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.x0YjbkJ58QreUqWu]{Harvest Celebration}每当你收获时，你就会庆祝，木之能量在你体内奔流。在你使用一个能力并选择收获后，若你至少收获了1株plant，你在接下来的1轮内于 Perception 检定、技能检定以及豁免上获得+1状态加值。若你在能力DC上为legendary，则你改为在 Perception 检定、技能检定以及豁免上获得+2状态加值。

形态能力 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.3KgLp71zdGslwGpp]{Trick or Treat}你在进行 Intimidation 检定以 Demoralize 时获得+1环境加值。当你在一个其中有敌人的方格里收获plant时，该敌人不再对你的 Demoralize 暂时免疫。

进化能力 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.0BpNDMzHkkn7DJVe]{Wooden Sword and Shield}你的爪击变形为木制剑与盾的形状。这会将你的爪击徒手攻击改为刃臂徒手攻击，造成1d8 slashing伤害，失去agile特性，并获得多用 P特性；以上数据已在上方统计中反映。此外，你可以用你的盾臂来 Raise a Shield，其效果等同于一面木制护盾，具有10硬度、60 HP以及30的BT。你获得 Shield Block反应动作（），但你只能用盾臂来使用它。当你刷新时，你的盾臂恢复其全部生命值，即使它曾被摧毁亦然。

Peepkin, Gourdian, and Pumpkinight

Element Wood

Attribute Modifiers Str +0, Dex +3, Con +2, Int -1, Wis +4, Cha +1

Eldamon Language Muan

Eldamon Hit Points 6

Eldamon Skills Acrobatics, Intimidation, Stealth

Eldamon Saving Throw Reflex

Senses low-light vision

Resistance earth, plant, time, water, wood

Weaknesses acid, air, cold, fire, poison

Speed 25 feet

Melee 1 claw (agile, finesse; only usable in battle form); Damage 1d4 slashing

Melee 1 blade arm (finesse, reach 10 feet, versatile P; only usable in evolved form); Damage 1d8 slashing

Evolution Condition Helping peepkin celebrate with truly wonderful decorations.

Elemental Ability @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.x0YjbkJ58QreUqWu]{Harvest Celebration}Whenever you harvest, you celebrate as the wood energy courses through you. After using a power and choosing to harvest, if you harvested at least one plant, you gain a +1 status bonus to Perception checks, skill checks, and saving throws for 1 round. If you’re legendary in power DCs, you instead gain a +2 status bonus to Perception checks, skill checks, and saving throws.

Form Ability @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.3KgLp71zdGslwGpp]{Trick or Treat}You gain a +1 circumstance bonus to Intimidation checks to Demoralize. When you harvest plants in a square with a foe in it, that foe is no longer temporarily immune to your Demoralize.

Evolution Ability @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.0BpNDMzHkkn7DJVe]{Wooden Sword and Shield}Your claws transform into the shape of a wooden sword and shield. This changes your claw unarmed attack into a blade arm unarmed attack that deals 1d8 slashing damage, loses the agile trait, and gains the versatile P trait; this is already reflected in the statistics above. Additionally, you can use your shield arm to Raise a Shield, with the effects of a wooden shield with 10 Hardness, 60 HP and a BT of 30. You gain the Shield Block reaction, which you can only use with your shield arm. When you refresh, your shield arm recovers all its Hit Points, even if it was destroyed.

Squamatch.name: 斯夸马奇 Squamatch
Squamatch.description:
Squamatch、Igunite与Iguanapalm

元素 火

属性调整值 Str +0, Dex +2, Con +3, Int -1, Wis +4, Cha +1

Eldamon语言 Pyric

Eldamon生命值 6

Eldamon技能 Acrobatics, Athletics, Intimidation

Eldamon豁免 Fortitude

感官 弱光视野

抗力 火、金属、植物、木材

弱点 寒冷、大地、水

速度 25尺

近战 1 尾巴（灵巧、娴熟；仅在进化时触及 10尺）；伤害 1d4 火（仅在进化时为 1d6 火）

近战 1 颌骨（仅在进化时触及 10尺）；伤害 1d6 钝击（仅在进化时为 1d8 钝击）

进化状态 帮助squamatch找到一个绝佳的日光浴地点。

元素能力 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.Q9K7bNPB17QuJCh9]{Undying Flame}他人很难扑灭你的火焰，即使有效的协助也比平时作用更小。你元素力量造成的持续火焰伤害的纯骰检定DC从DC 15提高到DC 16，或在特别有效的协助后从DC 10提高到DC 12。

形态能力 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.YALRUwgm0VLgs4fP]{Iguana’s Verve}你对抗麻痹与睡眠的豁免获得+2环境加值。若你对任一状态掷出成功，则改为大成功或大失败中的大成功；且若你将被麻痹或陷入睡眠至少2轮，将该持续时间减少1轮。

进化能力 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.cXczKQAI6qcflInp]{Deep Burns}你尾巴中不灭的火焰强化了你的燃烧攻击。你用自身力量造成的持续火焰伤害获得+2状态加值。

Evolution Condition Helping squamatch find an excellent location for sunbathing.

Elemental Ability @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.Q9K7bNPB17QuJCh9]{Undying Flame}It’s particularly hard for others to put out your flames, and even an effective form of assistance helps less than usual. The flat check DCs for the persistent fire damage from your elemental powers increase from DC 15 to DC 16, or from DC 10 to DC 12 after especially effective assistance.

Form Ability @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.YALRUwgm0VLgs4fP]{Iguana’s Verve}You gain a +2 circumstance bonus to your saving throws against paralysis and sleep. If you roll a success against either condition, you get a critical success instead, and if you would be paralyzed or put to sleep for at least 2 rounds, reduce that duration by 1 round.

Evolution Ability @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.cXczKQAI6qcflInp]{Deep Burns}The undying flame in your tail empowers your burning attacks. You gain a +2 status bonus to persistent fire damage you deal with your powers.

Meese.name: 驼鹿 Meese
Meese.description:
米斯、罗登与赛灵鼠

元素 心智

属性调整值 Str -1, Dex +3, Con +2, Int +0, Wis +4, Cha +1

艾达兽语言 星界语

艾达兽生命值 4

艾达兽技能 特技，威吓，隐匿

艾达兽豁免 意志

感官 弱光视野

抗力 电击，光，心智，传送

弱点 黑暗，音波，灵体，时代

速度 25英尺

近战 1 尾巴（灵巧，娴熟，仅在进化时触及 20英尺）；伤害 1d4 钝击外加 1 精神（仅在进化时为 1d6 钝击外加 1 精神）

进化状态 帮助米斯在其对宝石的热爱中达到巅峰（例如找到一颗真正惊艳的宝石，或完成一套不同宝石的收藏）。

元素能力 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.qZqrUQbBplSjEbrv]{Exploit Lapse}你的心智力量会对因困惑或恐惧而使心智脆弱的生物造成更多伤害。你使用心智力量进行伤害时获得状态加值，其数值等于该生物从任何来源获得的迟钝值与你的心智力量、你的【挫志】或（若你是艾达兽）你的凡人伙伴的【挫志】所施加的恐惧值两者中较高者，最大为+2。若你在力量DC上为专家，你的心智力量的伤害状态加值上限为+3。若你为大师，只要某个生物具有任意数值的恐惧或迟钝，该状态加值就提高1，总上限为+5；若你为传奇，只要某个生物具有任意数值的恐惧或迟钝，该状态加值总共提高2，总上限为+6。

形态能力 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.Gy5ILwWf8DABKI8d]{Amethyst Sled}你用一枚心智紫水晶轻松地在零散碎石、沙地或积雪上滑行。你忽略由碎石、沙地或积雪造成的困难地形。

进化能力 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.K8B5EiosL97u0Buo]{Quadruple Tails}你的尾巴分裂为四条螺旋尾巴，将其触及提高到20英尺。此外，你的四条尾巴帮助你稳定愈发强大的紫水晶雪橇，使你能忽略地面上一切困难地形，而不再仅限于由碎石、沙地或积雪造成的困难地形。

属性调整值进程

进阶训练（5级） Str +0, Dex +3, Con +3, Int +1, Wis +4, Cha +2

艾达兽进化（11级） Str +0, Dex +4, Con +4, Int +1, Wis +5, Cha +2

Meese, Rhoden, and Psyrat

Element Mind

Attribute Modifiers Str -1, Dex +3, Con +2, Int +0, Wis +4, Cha +1

Eldamon Language Astral

Eldamon Hit Points 4

Eldamon Skills Acrobatics, Intimidation, Stealth

Eldamon Saving Throw Will

Senses low-light vision

Resistance electricity, light, mind, teleportation

Weaknesses darkness, sonic, spirit, time

Speed 25 feet

Melee 1 tail (agile, finesse, reach 20 feet when evolved only); Damage 1d4 bludgeoning plus 1 mental (1d6 bludgeoning plus 1 mental when evolved only)

Evolution Condition Helping meese reach a pinnacle in their love for gemstones (such as by finding a truly amazing gem or completing a collection of different gems).

Elemental Ability @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.qZqrUQbBplSjEbrv]{Exploit Lapse}Your mind powers deal more damage to creatures whose mind is vulnerable due to being befuddled or afraid. You gain a status bonus to damage with your mind powers equal to the highest of a creature’s stupefied value from any source or their frightened value they received from your mind powers, your Demoralize, or your mortal friend’s Demoralize if you’re an eldamon, to a maximum of +2. If you’re an expert in power DCs, the maximum status bonus to damage with your mind powers is +3. If you’re a master, the status bonus increases by 1 as long as a creature is either frightened or stupefied at any value, to a total maximum of +5, and if you’re legendary, the status bonus increases by a total of 2 as long as a creature is frightened or stupefied at any value, to a total maximum of +6.

Form Ability @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.Gy5ILwWf8DABKI8d]{Amethyst Sled}You use a mind amethyst to sled across scattered rubble, sand, or snow with ease. You ignore difficult terrain from rubble, sand, or snow.

Evolution Ability @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.K8B5EiosL97u0Buo]{Quadruple Tails}Your tails split into four spiralling tails, increasing their reach to 20 feet. Additionally, your four tails help you steady your increasingly powerful amethyst sled, allowing you ignore all difficult terrain on the ground, not just difficult terrain from rubble, sand, or snow.

Skepi.name: 斯凯皮 Skepi
Skepi.description:
斯凯皮、海德伦与赫努门

元素 生命

属性调整值 Str +0, Dex +3, Con +2, Int -1, Wis +4, Cha +1

Eldamon语言 Jyoti

Eldamon生命值 8

Eldamon技能 特技运动、威吓、生存

Eldamon豁免 反射

感官 弱光视野

抗力 光、活力（由于它不是不死生物，通常不会受到活力伤害）

弱点 黑暗、死亡、暗影

速度 25 尺

近战 1 角（灵巧、娴熟；仅在进化时触及 10 尺）；伤害 1d4 穿刺外加 1 点额外活力（仅在进化时为 1d6 穿刺外加 1 点额外活力）

进化状态 帮助斯凯皮拯救他人并保护无助者。

元素能力 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.fMSZeNqPduzkyc1o]{替罪羊}每当一名相邻的盟友受到伤害，且你保持清醒并拥有超过 1 点生命值时，你失去 1 点生命值（或该伤害值，以较小者为准），并将其所受伤害减少相同数值。若你在力量 DC 上为大师且拥有超过 2 点生命值，则你改为失去 2 点生命值而非 1 点。

形态能力 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.PS08QFpgf1BKKv30]{救生员之发}当你濒死之际，你那一簇簇红发会排斥毁灭。若你当前生命值少于你最大生命值的一半，你获得对所有伤害类型的抗力 1。若你在力量 DC 上为大师，则提升为对所有伤害类型的抗力 2。

进化能力 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.QyBl4HgiuZHMILqs]{救赎花环}你的花环纪念你曾拯救之人，并在你为他人牺牲时赋予你力量。在你为保护他人免受伤害而受到伤害，或为保护他人免受伤害而失去生命值（例如来自你的替罪羊能力）之后，你获得对 AC 与豁免的 +1 状态加值，持续至你下个回合结束。

力量进程

Skepi, Heidrun, and Khnumen

Element Life

Attribute Modifiers Str +0, Dex +3, Con +2, Int -1, Wis +4, Cha +1

Eldamon Language Jyoti

Eldamon Hit Points 8

Eldamon Skills Acrobatics, Intimidation, Survival

Eldamon Saving Throw Reflex

Senses low-light vision

Resistance light, vitality (since it isn’t undead, it can’t normally be harmed by vitality)

Weaknesses darkness, death, shadow

Speed 25 feet

Melee 1 horn (agile, finesse; reach 10 feet when evolved only); Damage 1d4 piercing plus 1 additional vitality (1d6 piercing plus 1 additional vitality when evolved only)

Evolution Condition Helping skepi save others and protect the helpless.

Elemental Ability @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.fMSZeNqPduzkyc1o]{Scapegoat}Whenever an adjacent ally takes damage and you are conscious with more than 1 Hit Point, you lose 1 Hit Point (or the amount of damage, whichever is less) and reduce the damage they take by the same amount. If you are a master in power DCs and have more than 2 Hit Points, you lose 2 Hit Points instead of 1.

Form Ability @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.PS08QFpgf1BKKv30]{Lifeguard Hair}Your tufts of red hair repel destruction when you are close to death. When you have fewer than half your maximum Hit Points, you gain resistance 1 to all damage types. If you are a master in power DCs, this increases to resistance 2 to all damage types.

Evolution Ability @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.QyBl4HgiuZHMILqs]{Garland of Salvation}Your garland commemorates those you have saved, and it empowers you whenever you sacrifice yourself for others. After taking damage to protect another from harm or losing Hit Points to protect another from harm (such as from your scapegoat ability), you gain a +1 status bonus to AC and saving throws until the end of your next turn.

Sundile.name: 桑迪尔 Sundile
Sundile.description:
Sundile、Arcadile与Rainbowbek

元素 光

属性调整值 Str +0, Dex +3, Con +2, Int +1, Wis +4, Cha - 1

Eldamon语言 Luxan

Eldamon生命值 6

Eldamon技能 特技，艺术学识，求生

Eldamon豁免 反射

感官 弱光视野

抗力 死亡，力场，光

弱点 黑暗，心灵，暗影，音波

速度 25尺

近战 1 颌骨（灵巧，娴熟，进化后才有触及 10尺）；伤害 1d4 穿刺（进化后才为 1d6 穿刺）

进化状态 帮助sundile完成一件真正体现其视野的艺术杰作。

元素能力 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.ns0YFb7wVwJ8yiNp]{Rainbow Light}当你用你的光之力量造成伤害时，你不再造成火焰伤害，而是掷1d8。掷出1时光为红色，你的力量造成火焰伤害；掷出2时光为橙色，你的力量造成强酸伤害；掷出3时光为黄色，你的力量造成电击伤害；掷出4时光为绿色，你的力量造成毒素伤害；掷出5时光为蓝色，你的力量造成音波伤害；掷出6时光为靛色，你的力量造成心灵伤害；掷出7时光为紫色，你的力量造成力场伤害。掷出8时，你从上述7种颜色与伤害类型中选择一种。若你的力量造成持续伤害，你仍只掷一次来决定光的颜色，并在该力量的持续时间内造成该伤害类型。

形态能力 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.FFVVgM1RVmsT1m0X]{Chromatic Ridges}你的脊棱会基于你的情绪呈现不同颜色，使你获得一种随机能量类型的抗力。当你相位显现时，或若你已处于相位显现状态则在一次遭遇开始时，掷1d8并参考彩虹光元素能力中的颜色与伤害类型。你的脊棱呈现你掷出的颜色（或若你掷出8则为你选择的颜色），并获得等同于你等级的、对相应伤害类型的抗力。若掷出7，此对力场的抗力可与作为光系eldamon而获得的基础抗力叠加。

进化能力 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.MEKjthSYtlZHvG3F]{Rainbow Banner}从你尾巴飘扬的彩虹旗帜能鼓舞你的盟友。30尺内能看见旗帜的盟友，在对抗恐惧的豁免上获得+1状态加值；且你可以以单动作挥舞旗帜，以便使用艺术学识准备援助一名盟友的攻击掷骰。

属性调整值进程

进阶训练（5级） Str +1, Dex +3, Con +3, Int +2, Wis +4, Cha +0

Eldamon进化（11级） Str +1, Dex +4, Con +4, Int +2, Wis +5, Cha +0

巅峰训练（15级） Str +2, Dex +5, Con +4, Int +3, Wis +5, Cha +1

最终属性提升（17级） Str +2, Dex +5, Con +4, Int +3, Wis +6, Cha +1

Sundile, Arcadile, and Rainbowbek

Element Light

Attribute Modifiers Str +0, Dex +3, Con +2, Int +1, Wis +4, Cha - 1

Eldamon Language Luxan

Eldamon Hit Points 6

Eldamon Skills Acrobatics, Art Lore, Survival

Eldamon Saving Throw Reflex

Senses low-light vision

Resistance death, force, light

Weaknesses darkness, mental, shadow, sonic

Speed 25 feet

Melee 1 jaws (agile, finesse, reach 10 feet when evolved only); Damage 1d4 piercing (1d6 piercing when evolved only)

Evolution Condition Helping sundile complete an artistic masterpiece that truly embodies their vision.

Elemental Ability @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.ns0YFb7wVwJ8yiNp]{Rainbow Light}When you deal damage with your light powers, instead of dealing fire damage, roll 1d8. On a 1 the light is red and your power deals fire damage, on a 2 the light is orange and your power deals acid damage, on a 3 the light is yellow and your power deals electricity damage, on a 4 the light is green and your power deals poison damage, on a 5 the light is blue and your power deals sonic damage, on a 6 the light is indigo and your power deals mental damage, and on a 7 the light is violet and your power deals force damage. On an 8, you choose one of the 7 colors and damage types. If your power deals damage over time, you still only roll once to determine the color of the light and deal that damage type for the duration of the power.

Form Ability @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.FFVVgM1RVmsT1m0X]{Chromatic Ridges}Your ridges take on a coloration based on your mood, granting you resistance to a random energy type. When you phase in, or at the beginning of an encounter if you’re already phased in, roll 1d8 and consult the colors and damage types from the rainbow light elemental ability. Your ridges take on the color you rolled (or the color you chose if you roll an 8), and you gain resistance equal to your level to the associated damage type. On a roll of 7, this resistance to force is cumulative with your base resistance from being a light eldamon.

Evolution Ability @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.MEKjthSYtlZHvG3F]{Rainbow Banner}The rainbow banner that flies from your tail can inspire your allies. Allies within 30 feet who can see the banner gain a +1 status bonus to saving throws against fear, and you can wave the banner as a single action in order to prepare to Aid an ally’s attack roll using Art Lore.

Chillot.name: 奇洛特 Chillot
Chillot.description:
奇洛特、暴雪獭与冰川獭

元素 冰

属性调整值 Str -1, Dex +3, Con +2, Int +0, Wis +4, Cha +1

Eldamon语言 Cryan

Eldamon生命值 6

Eldamon技能 Acrobatics, Intimidation, Stealth

Eldamon豁免 Reflex

感官 幽灵嗅探，弱光视野

抗力 cold, plant, sonic, 时代, wood

弱点 body, 大地, 火, metal

速度 25 feet

近战 1 尾巴（agile, finesse；仅在进化后触及为10 feet）；伤害 1d4 cold（仅在进化后为1d6 cold）

进化状态 帮助奇洛特学会真正令人毛骨悚然的幽灵故事。

元素能力 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.aoxtrbfc9C18H6ym]{Veins of Ice}在你体内奔涌的寒冷会抑制大多数形式的持续伤害，使其更难维持。你对除 mental、vitality 与 void 伤害之外的持续伤害进行的纯骰检定DC（这些伤害会直接攻击你的心智或生命力）从DC 15降低至DC 12；若有特别有效的协助，则从DC 10降低至DC 7。

形态能力 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.SjaU9bkkjjB4oANe]{Ghost Sniffer}你拥有嗅觉，作为30 feet范围内的模糊感官（依照嗅觉的常规规则，在上风或下风时分别减半与加倍），但此嗅觉只能闻到带有幽灵（特征）、灵体、haunts以及其他无实体生物。若该生物为无实体且完全位于一件固体物体内，幽灵嗅探不会察觉到它，除非你在同一或相邻方格内主动嗅闻该物体，这需要一个单动作。

进化能力 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.VIWsHQDE27ALPsM9]{Dauntless}有人说你冷血，也有人说你无畏。不管怎样，其他人觉得可怕的事物，你通常只会觉得刺激。每当你获得惊惧（状态）时，你将惊惧值降低1。

属性调整值进程

进阶训练（5th） Str +0, Dex +3, Con +3, Int +1, Wis +4, Cha +2

Eldamon进化（11th） Str +0, Dex +4, Con +4, Int +1, Wis +5, Cha +2

Chillot, Blizzotter, and Glaciotter

Element Ice

Attribute Modifiers Str -1, Dex +3, Con +2, Int +0, Wis +4, Cha +1

Eldamon Language Cryan

Eldamon Hit Points 6

Eldamon Skills Acrobatics, Intimidation, Stealth

Eldamon Saving Throw Reflex

Senses ghost sniffer, low-light vision

Resistance cold, plant, sonic, time, wood

Weaknesses body, earth, fire, metal

Speed 25 feet

Melee 1 tail (agile, finesse; reach 10 feet when evolved only); Damage 1d4 cold (1d6 cold when evolved only)

Evolution Condition Helping chillot learn truly spine-tingling ghost stories.

Elemental Ability @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.aoxtrbfc9C18H6ym]{Veins of Ice}The cold pumping through your body chills out most forms of persistent damage, making it harder for them to last. Your flat check DC against persistent damage other than mental, vitality, and void damage (which attack your mind or life force directly) decreases from DC 15 to DC 12, or from DC 10 to DC 7 with especially effective assistance.

Form Ability @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.SjaU9bkkjjB4oANe]{Ghost Sniffer}You have scent as an imprecise sense out to 30 feet (halved and doubled as normal for scent when smelling upwind or downwind), except the scent can only smell ghosts, spirits, haunts, and other incorporeal creatures. If the creature is incorporeal and fully within a solid object, ghost sniffer doesn’t notice them unless you actively sniffs the object while within the same or an adjacent square, which requires a single action.

Evolution Ability @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.VIWsHQDE27ALPsM9]{Dauntless}Some call you cold-blooded, others call you fearless. Either way, things others find scary you normally just find exciting. Whenever you gain the frightened condition, you reduce the frightened value by 1.

Kagekko.name: 影月子 Kagekko
Kagekko.description:
Kagekko、Geckrepuscle与Geckhonsu

元素 黑暗

属性调整值 Str +1, Dex +2, Con +3, Int +0, Wis +4, Cha -1

Eldamon语言 Shadowtongue

Eldamon生命值 4

Eldamon技能 Acrobatics, Athletics, Stealth

Eldamon豁免 意志

感官 强化黑暗视觉

抗力 黑暗、精神、阴影、灵体

弱点 身体、光、音波

速度 25英尺

近战 1 颌骨（灵巧、娴熟，且仅在进化后触及10英尺）；伤害 1d4穿刺（且仅在进化后为1d6穿刺）

进化状态 帮助kagekko不仅学会如何制定真正周全的应急预案，还要意识到有时候是时候放手，不必为自己留后备方案而担忧。

元素能力 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.1ZMzXDwwYipZShTG]{Contingent Shroud}你随时准备好应对一切，有一层笼罩的帷幕保护你免受伤害。当你掷骰先攻时，你获得笼罩的1，直到你在战斗中的第一个回合结束为止。若你在战斗的第1轮相位进入战斗，此效果同样适用。

形态能力 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.vtbNfXKIsaqN6NlV]{Gecko Tongue}你的舌头特别长，触及为10英尺。你可以用舌头在远处进行受限的操作类动作，这些动作不需要手指或显著的手部敏捷（例如开门），或用来擒抱一个生物。

进化能力 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.z4HBOpGY4V0itDsy]{Sixfold Spiked Legs}你获得第三对长满尖刺的腿。你的陆地速度提升至30英尺，并且当你穿过一名敌人的空间时（通常是因为你的体型比对方大三级，或你翻滚穿越了其空间），对方会受到1d8穿刺伤害。无论你穿过该空间多少次，一个生物每轮只会受到一次该穿刺伤害。你的舌头触及提升至20英尺。

力量进程

Kagekko, Geckrepuscle, and Geckhonsu

Element Darkness

Attribute Modifiers Str +1, Dex +2, Con +3, Int +0, Wis +4, Cha -1

Eldamon Language Shadowtongue

Eldamon Hit Points 4

Eldamon Skills Acrobatics, Athletics, Stealth

Eldamon Saving Throw Will

Senses greater darkvision

Resistance darkness, mental, shadow, spirit

Weaknesses body, light, sonic

Speed 25 feet

Melee 1 jaws (agile, finesse, reach 10 feet when evolved only); Damage 1d4 piercing (1d6 piercing when evolved only)

Evolution Condition Helping kagekko not only learn how to make truly comprehensive contingencies, but also realize that sometimes the time comes to let something drop and not worry about having a backup plan.

Elemental Ability @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.1ZMzXDwwYipZShTG]{Contingent Shroud}You’re ready for anything with a shroud to protect you from harm. When you roll initiative, you become shrouded 1 until the end of your first turn in combat. This also applies if you phase into combat on the first round of combat.

Form Ability @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.vtbNfXKIsaqN6NlV]{Gecko Tongue}Your tongue is especially long, with a reach of 10 feet. You can use your tongue to make limited manipulate actions from a distance that don’t require fingers or significant manual dexterity (such as opening a door) or to Grapple a creature.

Evolution Ability @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.z4HBOpGY4V0itDsy]{Sixfold Spiked Legs}You gain a third pair of legs that are covered with spikes. Your land Speed increases to 30 feet, and when you move through a foe’s space (usually either because you are three sizes larger or you Tumbled Through their space), they take 1d8 piercing damage. A creature only takes this piercing damage once per round, no matter how many times you move through this space. Your tongue’s reach increases to 20 feet.

Tawhirtle.name: 塔沃特尔 Tawhirtle
Tawhirtle.description:
Tawhirtle、Chelowatt 与 Thortoise

元素 电击

属性调整值 Str +1, Dex +2, Con +3, Int -1, Wis +4, Cha +0

Eldamon 语言 Voltan

Eldamon 生命值 6

Eldamon 技能 Athletics、Intimidation、Survival

Eldamon 豁免 Fortitude

感官 弱光视野

抗力 空气、电击、金属

弱点 大地、精神、传送

速度 25 英尺

近战 1 尾巴（agile、finesse；仅在进化后触及 10 英尺）；伤害 1d4 电击（仅在进化后为 1d6 电击）

近战 1 角；伤害 1d6 穿刺（仅在进化后为 1d8 穿刺）

进化状态 帮助 tawhirtle 从他们的冒险中体验到纯粹的刺激。

元素能力 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.FBc2TxqWSRomT9fC]{Resistant Shell}你拥有一层耐电的能量外壳，使你能够安全地储存电荷。当你因自身的元素力量而带电时，你不会进入震慑状态，且你不会因那些会移除震慑状态的效果而降低你的带电状态。

形态能力 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.hkwTJA1O2oEUR1Cv]{Retreat Into Shell}以单动作，你可以缩入你的壳中。若如此，你获得 AC +2 环境加值并陷入 immobilized 状态。这些效果持续到你下一回合结束，不过你可以用单动作提前结束该效果。

进化能力 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.hnll5yw6aq6xS6Zz]{Shell Fortification}你的壳能强化你以抵御危险的打击。你获得等同于你等级一半的精准伤害抗力；并且当一个生物对你造成大成功或大失败时，你可以尝试一次 DC 17 纯骰检定。成功时，该大成功或大失败改为普通命中。

属性调整值进程

进阶训练（5级）Str +2, Dex +3, Con +3, Int +0, Wis +4, Cha +1

Eldamon 进化（11级） Str +2, Dex +4, Con +4, Int +0, Wis +5, Cha +1

Tawhirtle, Chelowatt, and Thortoise

Element Electricity

Attribute Modifiers Str +1, Dex +2, Con +3, Int -1, Wis +4, Cha +0

Eldamon Language Voltan

Eldamon Hit Points 6

Eldamon Skills Athletics, Intimidation, Survival

Eldamon Saving Throw Fortitude

Senses low-light vision

Resistance air, electricity, metal

Weaknesses earth, mental, teleportation

Speed 25 feet

Melee 1 tail (agile, finesse; reach 10 feet when evolved only); Damage 1d4 electricity (1d6 electricity when evolved only)

Melee 1 horn; Damage 1d6 piercing (1d8 piercing when evolved only)

Evolution Condition Helping tawhirtle experience pure thrill from their risks.

Elemental Ability @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.FBc2TxqWSRomT9fC]{Resistant Shell}You have an outer shell of energy that’s electrically resistant, allowing you to safely store charge. When you are charged from your own elemental powers, you don’t become shocked, and you don’t reduce your charged condition from effects that would remove the shocked condition.

Form Ability @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.hkwTJA1O2oEUR1Cv]{Retreat Into Shell}As a single action, you can Retreat Into your Shell. If you do, you gain a +2 circumstance bonus to AC and are immobilized. These effects last until the end of your next turn, though you can end the effect early with a single action.

Evolution Ability @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.hnll5yw6aq6xS6Zz]{Shell Fortification}Your shell fortifies you from dangerous blows. You gain resistance equal to half your level to precision damage, and when a creature critically hits you, you can attempt a DC 17 flat check. On a success, the critical hit becomes a normal hit instead.

Shadoppy.name: 影扑皮 Shadoppy
Shadoppy.description:
Shadoppy、Shadopossum 与 Shadelphis

元素 黑暗

属性调整值 Str +0, Dex +2, Con +3, Int -1, Wis +4, Cha +1

Eldamon 语言 Shadowtongue

Eldamon 生命值 4

Eldamon 技能 特技、威吓、隐匿

Eldamon 豁免 强韧

感官 强化黑暗视觉

抗力 黑暗、心灵、暗影、灵体

弱点 肉体、光、音波

速度 25 尺（仅在进化时获得飞行速度 25 尺）

近战 1 骨质颌骨（灵巧，仅在进化时触及 10 尺）；伤害 1d6 穿刺（仅在进化时为 1d8 穿刺）

近战 1 爪击（灵活、灵巧，仅在进化时触及 10 尺）；伤害 1d4 挥砍（仅在进化时为 1d6 挥砍）

进化状态 通过完成其收藏或对骨骼达到深刻理解，帮助 shadoppy 将其对骨头的痴迷付诸实现。

元素能力 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.DRqSregb5OP489c6]{笼罩的力量}当你笼罩于黑暗中时，你的黑暗力量会造成额外伤害。当你具有笼罩的状态时，你使用黑暗力量造成的寒冷伤害获得 +1 状态加值；若你在力量 DC 上为专家则提升至 +3，若为大师则为 +4，若为传奇则为 +5。

形态能力 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.piTNPCRDwWg4h8v2]{骨之斗篷}你被保护性的骨骼覆盖，避免最糟的情况发生。你的保护性骨之斗篷使你对大成功或大失败造成的重击获得等同于你等级一半（最低 1）的抗力。该抗力不能将一次重击的伤害降低到低于一次普通命中的伤害。

进化能力 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.yVT9zHK9tDigNyLW]{暗影飞行}你身体的下半部分拖曳成暗影，使你能够翱翔。你获得等同于你速度的飞行速度，并且你那扭曲暗影构成的身体使你在进行用于【逃脱】的特技检定时获得 +1 环境加值。

Elemental Ability @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.DRqSregb5OP489c6]{Shrouded Power}When you’re shrouded in darkness, your darkness powers deal additional damage. While you have the shrouded condition, you gain a +1 status bonus to cold damage with darkness powers; this increases to +3 if you’re an expert in power DCs, +4 if you’re a master in power DCs, and +5 if you’re legendary in power DCs.

Form Ability @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.piTNPCRDwWg4h8v2]{Bone Mantle}Your covered in protective bones that prevent the worst from happening. Your protective bone mantle grants you resistance equal to half your level (minimum 1) to critical hits. This resistance can’t reduce the damage from a critical hit lower than the damage from a normal hit.

Evolution Ability @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.yVT9zHK9tDigNyLW]{Shadow Flight}The bottom of your body trails away into shadows, allowing you to soar. You gain a fly Speed equal to your Speed, and your body of twisting shadow gives you a +1 circumstance bonus to Acrobatics checks made to Escape.

Simiens.name: 类人猿 Simiens
Simiens.description:
猿灵（Simiens）、记忆猴（Mnemonkey）与语义智猴（Semnostic）

元素 心智

属性调整值 Str +0, Dex +3, Con +2, Int +1, Wis +4, Cha -1

Eldamon语言 星界语

Eldamon生命值 4

Eldamon技能 杂技、威吓、隐匿

Eldamon豁免 意志

感官 弱光视野

抗力 电击、光、心智、传送

弱点 黑暗、音波、灵体、时代

速度 25尺

近战 1 颚（灵巧，娴熟，仅在进化时触及10尺）；伤害 1d4 穿刺（仅在进化时为1d6 穿刺）

进化状态 帮助猿灵获得一次哲学上的突破。

元素特性 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.tTp3liVgzC6nxBz4]{沉思瞬间}当你在战斗中停顿片刻进行沉思时，你的心智防御会提高。在一次战斗遭遇期间，当你在自己的回合使用一个刷新威能或一次涌动且没有使用一个主动威能时，你获得对意志豁免的+2状态加值，持续至你的下个回合开始。若你使用心智宫殿，则改为获得+4状态加值。

形态特性 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.7xWNnjOKLggbxZtj]{手部灵巧}作为一只猴子，你比其他eldamon具有更高的手部敏捷。你可以执行交互动作并握持基础物体。这不会让你能够挥舞武器、盾牌或大多数手持魔法或炼金物品，不过你可以捡起并给自己喂服药水、灵药，以及类似的简单饮品。

进化特性 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.JlfJPrSbQfq2nSX8]{心智花环}你的头部与上半身被强大的心智能量所环绕。一名生物若尝试对你进行一次近战徒手打击或一次非触及的近战打击（无论是否命中你），都会受到4点心智伤害，并需以你的威能DC进行一次基础意志豁免。在第19等级时，此伤害提升为5点心智伤害。

Eldamon Saving Throw Will

Speed 25 feet

Melee 1 jaws (agile, finesse, reach 10 feet when evolved only); Damage 1d4 piercing (1d6 piercing when evolved only)

Evolution Condition Helping simiens reach a philosophical breakthrough.

Elemental Ability @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.tTp3liVgzC6nxBz4]{Moment of Contemplation}When you pause for a moment to contemplate during a battle, your mental defenses increase. During a combat encounter, when you use a refresh power or a surge on your turn and don’t use an active power, you gain a +2 status bonus to Will saves until your next turn. If you use Mind Palace, you gain a +4 status bonus instead.

Form Ability @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.7xWNnjOKLggbxZtj]{Manual Dexterity}As a monkey, you have more manual dexterity than other eldamon. You can perform Interact actions and hold basic objects. This doesn’t allow you to wield weapons, shields, or most held magical or alchemical items, though you can pick up and feed yourself potions, elixirs, and similar simple potables.

Evolution Ability @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.JlfJPrSbQfq2nSX8]{Mental Wreath}Your head and upper body are wreathed with powerful mental energy. A creature that attempts a melee unarmed Strike or a non-reach melee Strike against you (whether or not it hits you) takes 4 mental damage, with a basic Will save against your power DC. At 19th level, this increases to 5 mental damage.

Etmoist.name: 埃特莫伊斯特 Etmoist
Etmoist.description:
埃特潮湿、卡查莱因与巨齿溺亡

元素 水

属性调整值 力量 +2，敏捷 +1，体质 +3，智力 -1，感知 +4，魅力 +0

艾达蒙语言 深海语

艾达蒙生命值 6

艾达蒙技能 特技，运动，威吓

艾达蒙豁免 强韧

感官 弱光视野

抗力 火，水

弱点 电击，植物，木

速度 20 尺，游泳 25 尺

近战 1 颌骨（仅进化后触及 10 尺）；伤害 1d6 穿刺（仅进化后为 1d8 穿刺）

进化状态 帮助埃特潮湿真正理解家庭的意义。

元素能力 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.ucQ39u12ZltQeNHe]{Raging Cycle}你的力量与防御会随潮汐起伏。在你使用一次高潮力量后，你的 AC 在 1 轮内承受 -1 惩罚。在你使用一次低潮力量后，你的 AC 在 1 轮内获得 +1 状态加值。当你使用高潮水力量时，你的伤害掷骰获得 +2 状态加值。若你在力量 DC 上为专家，该加值提升为 +3；若为大师，提升为 +4；若为传奇，提升为 +5。

形态能力 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.4YVeOMiqwqIr6YIT]{Crimson Gullet}当你准备使用高潮力量时，你体内狂暴的水之能量会发出深红色辉光。当你处于高潮时，你将狂怒循环给予伤害掷骰的状态加值加到你的徒手颌骨打击上。此外，若你成功进行一次擒抱检定以将一名敌人擒抱在你口中，该敌人会因这股横冲直撞的水之能量而受到等同于该状态加值数值的钝击伤害。

进化能力 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.8qTeTA7v5fnkBRwG]{Armor Spikes}你全身覆有装甲尖刺，能刺穿你的敌人。一名生物若尝试对你进行一次近战徒手打击或一次非触及的近战打击（无论是否命中你），都会受到 4 点穿刺伤害，并需针对你的力量 DC 进行一次基础反射豁免。于第 19 等级时，该伤害提升为 5 点穿刺伤害。

属性调整值进程

进阶训练（第5级） 力量 +3，敏捷 +2，体质 +3，智力 +0，感知 +4，魅力 +1

艾达蒙进化（第11级） 力量 +4，敏捷 +2，体质 +4，智力 +0，感知 +5，魅力 +1

巅峰训练（第15级） 力量 +4，敏捷 +3，体质 +5，智力 +1，感知 +5，魅力 +2

最终属性提升（第17级） 力量 +4，敏捷 +3，体质 +5，智力 +1，感知 +6，魅力 +2

Etmoist, Carcharain, and Megalodrown

Element Water

Attribute Modifiers Str +2, Dex +1, Con +3, Int -1, Wis +4, Cha +0

Eldamon Language Thalassic

Eldamon Hit Points 6

Eldamon Skills Acrobatics, Athletics, Intimidation

Eldamon Saving Throw Fortitude

Senses low-light vision

Resistance fire, water

Weaknesses electricity, plant, wood

Speed 20 feet, swim 25 feet

Melee 1 jaws (reach 10 feet when evolved only); Damage 1d6 piercing (1d8 piercing when evolved only)

Evolution Condition Helping etmoist truly come to see the meaning of family.

Elemental Ability @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.ucQ39u12ZltQeNHe]{Raging Cycle}Your power and defenses fluctuate with the tides. After using a high tide power, you take a -1 penalty to your AC for 1 round. After using a low tide power, you gain a +1 status bonus to AC for 1 round. When using a high tide water power, you gain a +2 status bonus to damage rolls. This increases to +3 if you’re an expert in power DCs, +4 if you’re a master in power DCs, and +5 if you’re legendary in power DCs.

Form Ability @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.4YVeOMiqwqIr6YIT]{Crimson Gullet}The raging water energy within you glows crimson when you’re ready to use a high tide power. When you’re in high tide, you add the status bonus to damage rolls from raging cycle to your unarmed jaws Strikes. Additionally, if you succeed at a Grapple check to grab a foe in your mouth, they take an amount of bludgeoning damage equal to that status bonus from the rampaging water energy.

Evolution Ability @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.8qTeTA7v5fnkBRwG]{Armor Spikes}You are covered in armored spikes that pierce your foes. A creature that attempts a melee unarmed Strike or a non-reach melee Strike against you (whether or not it hits you) takes 4 piercing damage, with a basic Reflex save against your power DC. At 19th level, this increases to 5 piercing damage.
